title: Pumpkin Tart with Spiced Xoconostle
description: A sweet and savory dessert featuring the flavors of pumpkin and xoconostle, topped with a crumbly crust.
instructions: Roll out the tart pastry dough and place it in a 9-inch tart pan.
In a medium bowl, mix together the pumpkin, xoconostle, smoked paprika, and roasted cinnamon.
Pour the pumpkin mixture into the tart shell.
Sprinkle the granulated sugar over the top of the pumpkin mixture.
Drizzle the melted butter over the sugar.
Bake for 40-45 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the filling is set.
